place: Bophut Hills, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Contemporary Hillside Villa with Panoramic Sea Views in Bophut Hills
blurb: An off-plan four-bedroom villa taking shape in the hills above Bophut, where bold cantilevered roofs and floor-to-ceiling glass open every room to panoramic views over the Gulf of Thailand. Four en-suite bedrooms, an open-plan living pavilion, an infinity-edge pool with jacuzzi, a private cinema and a fitness studio sit across 521 m² of built area on a 900 m² plot. One of only four residences in a gated hillside enclave — three remain from ฿35,900,000 each, with the first already under construction for January 2027 handover.
detail:
Set in the serene hills of Bophut, this off-plan villa blends contemporary architecture with the natural beauty of Koh Samui — a modern tropical sanctuary of expansive open spaces, soaring floor-to-ceiling glass and bold cantilevered roofs that draw natural light and verdant scenery into every room. Oriented for privacy and panoramic ocean views, it captures the seamless indoor-outdoor rhythm that defines island living at its best.

Inside are four spacious bedrooms, each with an en-suite bathroom and built-in wardrobe, the master suite finished with a luxurious freestanding bathtub. The open-plan living area gathers a lounge, dining space and a fully equipped Western-style kitchen beneath one roofline, with air conditioning and ceiling fans throughout. Interior living space measures 312 m², with a further 93 m² of covered exterior areas for a total built area of 521 m², all set on a 900 m² Chanote plot.

Outdoors, an infinity-edge swimming pool with a Bali-stone finish, sun-soaked tanning platform and jacuzzi (12 m x 4 m, chlorine system) anchors a partially covered terrace with sun-beds and an outdoor shower. A separate outdoor living area pairs a lounge and dining space with a secondary kitchen, ideal for entertaining, while a private fitness studio (24 m²) and a private home cinema room (33 m²) round out the amenities. A covered carport takes two vehicles, framed by landscaped garden and reached by concrete road.

The villa is one of four luxury residences in an exclusive Bophut Hills development; the first is already sold and under construction, with progress open to view on-site and delivery scheduled for January 2027 — leaving three now available at ฿35,900,000 each. Held on a Chanote title and sold freehold with the company, it carries no monthly common fees, with government electricity and a private deep-well water supply. Sold unfurnished, with an optional bespoke high-end furniture package available at ฿2,000,000. The setting balances seclusion with convenience: 3.5 km to the main road, 7-Eleven and pharmacy, 4 km to Fisherman's Village and the beaches, 4.4 km to Big C, 5 km to the International School of Samui, 7.3 km to Central Festival and 9.2 km to Samui International Airport.

features.l: 312 m² interior · 521 m² built · 900 m² land
Chanote title · freehold · no common fees
One of four villas — three remaining
